name: GetCurrentUserId
description: Gets the ID of the currently logged-in user.
signature: public static int GetCurrentUserId()

name: RemoveUser
description: Permanently removes a user from the database (hard delete).
signature: public static void RemoveUser(int portalId, int userId, bool notify = false, bool deleteAdmin = false)

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to remove.

parameters.name: deleteAdmin
parameters.description: Whether to allow deletion of admin users.

name: DeleteUser
description: Moves a user to the recycle bin (soft delete).
signature: public static void DeleteUser(int portalId, int userId, bool notify = false, bool deleteAdmin = false)

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to delete.

parameters.name: deleteAdmin
parameters.description: Whether to allow deletion of admin users.

name: UnDeleteUser
description: Restores a user from the recycle bin.
signature: public static void UnDeleteUser(int portalId, int userId)

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to restore.

name: GetCurrentUserDisplayName
description: Gets the display name of the currently logged-in user.
signature: public static string GetCurrentUserDisplayName()

name: SetCurrentUserDisplayName
description: Sets the display name for the currently logged-in user.
signature: public static void SetCurrentUserDisplayName(string displayName)

name: GetCurrentUserName
description: Gets the username of the currently logged-in user.
signature: public static string GetCurrentUserName()

name: GetCurrentUserEmail
description: Gets the email address of the currently logged-in user.
signature: public static string GetCurrentUserEmail()

name: GetUserRoles
description: Gets a list of roles for a specified user or the current user.
signature: public static List<string> GetUserRoles(int portalid = -1, int userId = -1)

parameters.name: portalid
parameters.description: The portal ID. Defaults to the current portal.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID. Defaults to the current user.

name: ResetPass
description: Initiates the password reset process for a user by their email address.
signature: public static bool ResetPass(string emailaddress, bool sendEmail)

parameters.name: sendEmail
parameters.description: If true, sends the password reset email.

name: ChangePassword
description: Changes the password for a specified user.
signature: public static bool ChangePassword(int portalId, int userId, string newPassword)

name: DoLogin
description: Logs a user in with the provided credentials.
signature: public static bool DoLogin(SessionParams sessionParams, string username, string password, bool rememberme)

parameters.name: sessionParams
parameters.description: Session parameters, including the user's host address.

parameters.name: rememberme
parameters.description: If true, creates a persistent cookie.

name: UserLogin
description: Performs a user login action.
signature: public static bool UserLogin(string userHostAddress, string username, string password, bool rememberme)

parameters.name: rememberme
parameters.description: If true, creates a persistent cookie.

name: UserLogin
description: Logs in a user programmatically without a password check, assuming they are already authenticated.
signature: public static void UserLogin(int portalId, string portalName, string userHostAddress, string username, bool rememberme)

parameters.name: rememberme
parameters.description: If true, creates a persistent cookie.

name: DoLogin
description: Logs a user in using data from a generic login form (SimplisityInfo).
signature: public static bool DoLogin(SimplisityInfo postInfo, SimplisityInfo paramInfo)

parameters.name: postInfo
parameters.description: Posted data containing username, password, and remember me flag.

name: LoginForm
description: Renders a login form using a Razor template.
signature: public static string LoginForm(string systemkey, SimplisityInfo sInfo, string interfacekey, int userid)

parameters.name: systemkey
parameters.description: The system key to identify the theme.

parameters.name: sInfo
parameters.description: Data to pass to the Razor template.

parameters.name: interfacekey
parameters.description: The interface key for the form's command.

name: RegisterForm
description: Renders a user registration form using a Razor template.
signature: public static string RegisterForm(SimplisityInfo systemInfo, SimplisityInfo sInfo, string interfacekey, int userid)

parameters.name: sInfo
parameters.description: Data to pass to the Razor template.

parameters.name: interfacekey
parameters.description: The interface key for the form's command.

name: RegisterUser
description: Registers a new user based on data from a SimplisityInfo object.
signature: public static string RegisterUser(SimplisityInfo sInfo, string currentCulture = "")

parameters.name: currentCulture
parameters.description: The culture for the new user.

name: RegisterUser
description: Registers a new user with the specified details.
signature: public static string RegisterUser(string displayname, string username, string useremail, string password, string confirmpassword, string currentCulture, bool approved)

parameters.name: currentCulture
parameters.description: The culture for the new user.

name: CreateUser
description: Creates a new user in the specified portal and optionally assigns them to a role.
signature: public static string CreateUser(int portalId, string username, string email, string roleName = "")

parameters.name: roleName
parameters.description: Optional role to assign to the user.

name: GetUserDataByUsername
description: Gets a UserData object for a user by their username.
signature: public static UserData GetUserDataByUsername(int portalId, string username)

name: GetUserDataByEmail
description: Gets a UserData object for a user by their email address.
signature: public static UserData GetUserDataByEmail(int portalId, string email)

name: GetUserData
description: Gets a UserData object containing detailed information about a user.
signature: public static UserData GetUserData(int portalId, int userId)

name: IsAuthorised
description: Checks if the current user is authorized (approved).
signature: public static bool IsAuthorised()

name: IsAuthorised
description: Checks if a specific user is authorized (approved).
signature: public static bool IsAuthorised(int portalId, int userId)

name: UnAuthoriseUser
description: Marks a user as not approved.
signature: public static void UnAuthoriseUser(int portalId, int userId)

name: AuthoriseUser
description: Marks a user as approved.
signature: public static void AuthoriseUser(int portalId, int userId)

name: UpdateEmail
description: Updates the email address for a user.
signature: public static UserData UpdateEmail(int portalId, int userId, string email)

name: GetUserProfileProperties
description: Gets a dictionary of all profile properties for a user.
signature: public static Dictionary<string, string> GetUserProfileProperties(int portalId, int userId)

name: GetUserProfileProperties
description: Gets a dictionary of all profile properties for a user by their user ID as a string.
signature: public static Dictionary<string, string> GetUserProfileProperties(string userId)

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID as a string.

name: SetUserProfileProperties
description: Sets multiple profile properties for a user.
signature: public static void SetUserProfileProperties(String userId, Dictionary<string, string> properties)

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID as a string.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: A dictionary of properties to set.

name: SetUserProfileProperties
description: Sets multiple profile properties for a user.
signature: public static void SetUserProfileProperties(int portalId, int userId, Dictionary<string, string> properties)

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: A dictionary of properties to set.

name: GetUserIdByUserName
description: Gets a user's ID from their username.
signature: public static int GetUserIdByUserName(int portalId, string username)

name: GetUsers
description: Gets a list of users as SimplisityRecord objects, optionally filtered by role.
signature: public static List<SimplisityRecord> GetUsers(int portalId, string inRole = "")

parameters.name: inRole
parameters.description: Optional role name to filter by.

name: GetUsers
description: Gets a paginated list of users as SimplisityRecord objects.
signature: public static List<SimplisityRecord> GetUsers(int portalId, int pageNumber, int pageSize, ref int totalRecord, bool includeDeleted = false, bool superUsersOnly = false)

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of records per page.

parameters.name: totalRecord
parameters.description: Returns the total number of records.

parameters.name: superUsersOnly
parameters.description: If true, returns only super users.

name: GetUsers
description: Searches for users by a text string and returns a list of SimplisityRecord objects.
signature: public static List<SimplisityRecord> GetUsers(int portalId, string searchtext, int returnLimit = 100)

parameters.name: searchtext
parameters.description: The text to search for in user fields.

parameters.name: returnLimit
parameters.description: The maximum number of users to return.

name: GetUsersUserData
description: Searches for users by a text string and returns a list of UserData objects.
signature: public static List<UserData> GetUsersUserData(int portalId, string searchtext, int returnLimit = 100)

parameters.name: searchtext
parameters.description: The text to search for in user fields.

parameters.name: returnLimit
parameters.description: The maximum number of users to return.

name: GetSuperUsers
description: Gets a list of all super users as SimplisityRecord objects.
signature: public static List<SimplisityRecord> GetSuperUsers()

name: GetUserIdByEmail
description: Gets a user's ID from their email address.
signature: public static int GetUserIdByEmail(int portalId, string email)

name: IsInRole
description: Checks if a specific user is in a given role.
signature: public static bool IsInRole(int portalId, int userId, string role)

name: IsInRole
description: Checks if the current user is in a given role.
signature: public static bool IsInRole(string role)

name: IsSuperUser
description: Checks if a specific user is a super user.
signature: public static bool IsSuperUser(int portalId, int userId)

name: IsSuperUser
description: Checks if the current user is a super user.
signature: public static bool IsSuperUser()

name: IsClientOnly
description: Checks if the current user has only the 'Collaborator' role and no higher-level roles.
signature: public static Boolean IsClientOnly()

name: IsManager
description: Checks if the current user is in the 'Manager' or 'Administrators' role.
signature: public static Boolean IsManager()

name: IsEditor
description: Checks if the current user has at least 'Collaborator' level permissions.
signature: public static Boolean IsEditor()

name: IsAdministrator
description: Checks if the current user is in the 'Administrators' role.
signature: public static Boolean IsAdministrator()

name: IsAdministrator
description: Checks if a specific user is an administrator.
signature: public static bool IsAdministrator(int portalId, int userId)

name: GetValidUser
description: Validates a user's credentials and returns the UserInfo object if valid.
signature: public static UserInfo GetValidUser(int PortalId, string username, string password)

name: IsValidUser
description: Checks if a user exists by username.
signature: public static bool IsValidUser(int PortalId, string username)

name: IsValidUser
description: Checks if a user's credentials are valid.
signature: public static bool IsValidUser(int PortalId, string username, string password)

name: IsValidUser
description: Checks if a user exists by user ID.
signature: public static bool IsValidUser(int portalId, int userId)

name: GetRoleById
description: Gets role information as a SimplisityRecord by role ID.
signature: public static SimplisityRecord GetRoleById(int portalId, int roleId)

name: GetRoles
description: Gets a dictionary of all roles in a portal.
signature: public static Dictionary<int, string> GetRoles(int portalId)

name: GetRoleByName
description: Gets role information as a SimplisityRecord by role name.
signature: public static SimplisityRecord GetRoleByName(int portalId, string roleName)

name: AddUserRole
description: Adds a user to a role.
signature: public static void AddUserRole(int portalId, int userId, int roleId)

name: AddUserRole
description: Adds a user to a role and optionally notifies the user.
signature: public static void AddUserRole(int portalId, int userId, int roleId, bool notifyUser)

name: RemoveUserRole
description: Removes a user from a role.
signature: public static void RemoveUserRole(int portalId, int userId, int roleId)

name: SignOut
description: Signs the current user out.
signature: public static void SignOut()

name: HasModuleAccess
description: Checks if a user has a specific level of access to a module.
signature: public static bool HasModuleAccess(int portalId, int userId, int moduleId, string permissionKey = "VIEW")

name: UpdateOrCreateUserProfileProperty
description: Updates or creates a DNN user profile property. If the property definition doesn't exist, it will be created.
signature: public static bool UpdateOrCreateUserProfileProperty(int userId, string key, string value, int portalId = 0, string category = "Custom", bool visibilityAllUsers = false)

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: The category for the property if it needs to be created.

parameters.name: visibilityAllUsers
parameters.description: The visibility mode for the property if it needs to be created.
